sources: NCSI via Muscat Daily (Jan 2025): 1,499,549 end-2024, 3% growth
NCSI via Oman Observer (Oct 2023): 6.1% national growth Q3 2023
NCSI via Oman Observer (Jan 2024): Muscat = 29.7% of national, 1,546,667
ONA (Aug 2024): 92 hospitals, 7,691 beds in Oman total
Grokipedia: MoH manages 50 hospitals with 5,024 beds (end 2023)
WHO benchmark: 3.0 beds per 1,000 population (global median)
Times of Oman / Oman Observer: 11 new hospitals under construction
Estimate: Muscat ~32% of total beds based on population share + capital concentration
Oman Observer (Aug 2024): 46 international schools, 61,704 students, 21 in Muscat
